subject: WM-0178 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. The original P2 is closed by one shared createBenchmarkStats recomputation of all five finite statistics with Object.is; the exact raw 1.419 ms versus reported 0 diagnostic now fails closed, while index/root exports, thresholds, workloads, schema and evidence are unchanged. Exact focused tests pass 2 files/15 tests. Read-only audit passes 31 JSON/sidecar pairs, 29 benchmark artifacts/99 results, final 7 artifacts/21 OK results and 62 unchanged hashes; admission CRLF/attributes and baseline/WM-0083 blobs remain exact. Typecheck, scoped ESLint, boundaries, handoff, taskctl, diff checks and full quality 78 files/475 tests pass; no admission or benchmark command was rerun.
